name: ai-devkit
description: An open toolbox of reusable AI-coding-agent workflows (skills) and adaptation prompts for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Install a toolbox of reusable AI-coding-agent workflows in Codex. The plugin ships the repo's skills — issue creation, branch planning, smart commits, test selection, branch finishing, cleanup, deep reasoning, a second-agent review pass, and more. Each skill is designed to be adapted to your stack rather than copied blindly.
defaultPrompt: Use ai-devkit to plan and finish this branch
Adapt an ai-devkit skill to this repo
Hunt a flaky test with ultrafix
